name: opencode-context-governor
description: Active token budget controller for OpenCode sessions. Tracks per-model, per-session token consumption with configurable warn/error thresholds.
author: OpenCode

scripts.test:smoke: node -e "const { Governor } = require('./src/index.js'); const gov = new Governor({ autoLoad: false }); const check = gov.checkBudget('smoke-session', 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5', 1000); if(!check || !check.status) throw new Error('Governor check failed'); console.log('context-governor smoke ok');"
